description: A payment-routing table change deployed outside the validated change window, combined with a skipped daily nostro reconciliation, produced four business days of misrouted settlement instructions that required manual repair and client redress.

causes.description: Daily nostro reconciliation control was not performed for four consecutive business days, so the misrouting went undetected.
Payment-routing table change was deployed without the required pre-deployment validation and outside the approved change window.
Operations staff had not been trained on the new reconciliation exception queue introduced in the prior release.
